response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned hands-on engineer with roughly 20 years of broad experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, and his current role does touch AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. However, the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role is a Director-level IC position requiring recognized AI thought leadership, strategic advisory capability with enterprise customers, and deep cloud platform expertise. The resume shows no evidence of executive-level influence, public AI expertise recognition, or the kind of product-scale AI work that would position him as a credible strategic advisor. His AI exposure is nascent and narrowly scoped to recent tooling work, not a demonstrated body of AI products or platforms.
strengths: Approximately 20 years of diverse software engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded systems, and cloud infrastructure, comfortably exceeding the 15-year minimum
Current role at re:cinq directly involves AI-agent infrastructure, MCP framework development, and agentic workflow tooling, showing emerging relevance to the AI focus area
Genuine entrepreneurial track record through founding GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform on Kubernetes) and early-stage startup experience at WatchUp
concerns: No advanced degree and no AI/ML specialization — the role strongly prefers a Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, and the two bachelor's degrees are in Computer Science and Fine Arts
No evidence of director-level strategic work: no executive advisory engagements, no influence over organizational roadmaps, and no record of shaping cloud or AI strategy at scale

AI involvement is recent (April 2025 onward) and narrowly scoped to tooling; there are no recognized publications, widely adopted AI platforms, or demonstrated products that would establish credibility as a strategic AI advisor

key_factors.factor: No director-level advisory or influence track record
Broad multi-domain engineering depth exceeding experience floor
